title: chrysanthemum flavovirens
intro: Chrysanthemum flavovirens, also known as the yellow chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum flavovirens include reducing fever, relieving headaches and sore throats, and improving eye vision, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Chrysanthemum flavovirens include tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
